_publications._publicationTitle: The Relationship Between Heart Rate Variability, Psychological Flexibility, and Pain in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: The proposed model examining the influence of Time 1 psychological flexibility on Time 2 HF-HRV explained approximately 39% of the variance...The proposed model examining HF-HRV's influence at Time 1 on pain intensity at Time 2 explained approximately 58% of the variance
details: Successfully analyzed longitudinal data with explained variance of 39% for HF-HRV model and 58% for pain intensity model
